blog.spotlightTitle: Sustainable defense: Organic defense procurement and Certification Standards
blog.spotlightBodyPrimary: Defense industry technologies and standards continue to evolve rapidly.
blog.spotlightBodySecondary: At Sultan Defense, we aim to integrate sustainable tactical equipment selection and eco-friendly production principles into every variety we grow. Achieving productivity goals is not possible without proper planning from the start — which is why we plan an eco-conscious approach for each cycle from day one.

solutions.title: Integrated Defense Supply Solutions for Global Buyers
solutions.lead: Sultan Defense provides integrated defense, tactical equipment and field support solutions for international B2B buyers, government procurement units, distributors and institutional clients. From product sourcing to quotation and export coordination, we help global buyers access reliable, export-ready defense and support systems.
solutions.metaDescription: Integrated B2B defense, tactical and field support supply solutions for international buyers, distributors and institutional clients.

export.title: Global Defense Export with DDP Delivery Capability
export.lead: Sultan Defense provides export-focused defense, tactical equipment and field support solutions for international B2B buyers, distributors and procurement companies — with a structured export process, professional documentation and DDP delivery capability for eligible products and approved destination countries.
export.metaDescription: Export-focused defense and tactical supply from Türkiye with DDP delivery capability, export documentation and international logistics coordination.

projects.title: Products

legal.title: Legal
legal.privacyDesc: Overview of how Sultan Defense handles contact, quotation and technical product data.
legal.privacyContent:
Sultan Defense uses submitted contact and quotation data only to evaluate requests, prepare offers and maintain production communication.

We do not request unnecessary personal data and we limit access to product files and technical documents to relevant operational teams.

For data updates or removal requests, you can contact us via the communication details provided on the contact page.
legal.termsDesc: General terms for using the Sultan Defense website, technical content and quotation communication channels.
legal.termsContent:
Information published on this website is provided for general technical and commercial guidance. Final product scope, variety selection and production conditions are clarified during the order process.

Visuals, technical notes and descriptions on the site do not constitute a final binding offer on their own.

All quotation and delivery commitments become valid only after mutual confirmation within the commercial process.
legal.qualityPolicyDesc: Summary of our commitment to quality, traceability and continuous improvement in defense procurement.
legal.qualityPolicyContent:
We focus on reliable products, consistent product performance and customer satisfaction. Production follows traceability, hygiene and technical standards.

When the full policy is published in the CMS, this page updates automatically.
legal.servicePolicyDesc: Overview of communication, quotation handling and customer support.
legal.servicePolicyContent:
Quote requests are evaluated and final terms are confirmed in writing. Our teams can help with variety selection and delivery topics.

You can share feedback at export@sultandefense.com.
legal.dataProtectionNoticeDesc: Summary of personal data processing and your rights under Turkish Law No. 6698 (PDPL / KVKK).
legal.dataProtectionNoticeContent:
Sultan Defense Ltd., Co. processes identity and contact data collected through contact, quote and order flows to respond to requests, perform contracts and meet legal obligations.

For rights and requests, contact export@sultandefense.com. When the full notice is published via the CMS, this page updates automatically.
legal.cookiePolicyDesc: How we use cookies on this website.
legal.cookiePolicyContent:
Cookies may be used for core functionality, preferences and security. You can manage cookies in your browser settings.

When the full policy is published via the CMS, this page updates automatically.
